backstory.original: A grumpy and headstrong dwarf with a penchant for springing traps rather than disarming them, if Binwin's not the first into battle then he's disappointed. There's nary a door, tankard, or acid pit that hasn't felt the wrath of Binwin Bronzebottom at one time or another.
backstory.display: 一个脾气暴躁而顽固的矮人，喜欢制造陷阱而不是解除陷阱。如果宾温没能第一个冲上战场，他会感到失望。没有一扇门、一个啤酒杯或一个酸池坑不曾感受过宾温·铜臀的愤怒。

description.original: Binwin attacks the front-most enemy with his twin axes, Rook and Ruin.
description.display: 宾温用他的双斧“欺诈”与“堕落”攻击最前方的敌人。

description.original: Binwin hops onto a sturdy wooden barrel and rides toward a single enemy, creating a path of destruction in his wake.
description.display: 宾温钻进一个坚固的木桶并滚向一名敌人，对路径上的一切造成毁灭伤害。

longDescription.original: Binwin hops onto a sturdy wooden barrel and rides toward a single enemy, dealing damage along the way. When he reaches the targeted enemy, the barrel explodes, dealing ultimate area damage and slowing all affected enemies.
longDescription.display: 宾温钻进一个坚固的木桶并滚向一名敌人，对路径上的一切造成伤害。当他到达目标敌人的位置时，木桶会爆炸，造成范围杀招伤害并减速所有范围内的敌人。

description.desc: Binwin's base chance to Critical Hit is 20%.
宾温造成暴击的基础概率为 20%。

Binwin gains a Bonus Hit when an adjacent Champion attacks. The next time he attacks, he consumes his Bonus Hits to deal additional hits to the enemy he attacks. If his target dies and Binwin still has Bonus Hits, he'll jump to a new enemy if possible. Unused Bonus Hits are lost when his attack ends. Caps at $max_stacks___2 stacks.
当一名与宾温相邻的勇士进行攻击时，宾温获得一次额外命中次数。他下一次攻击时，会消耗他的额外命中次数，对他攻击的敌人造成额外命中。如果宾温的目标死亡而他仍有额外命中次数，他会跳转攻击一名新的敌人（如有可能）。当他的攻击结束时，未使用的额外命中次数会被清零。堆叠上限为 $max_stacks___2 层。

tipText.original: Binwin deals more hits based on how many times those near him attack before he does. He also deals far more damage if he does more hits in one attack.
tipText.display: 根据宾温周围的勇士在他攻击之前发动攻击的次数，他会造成更多次命中。如果他一次攻击造成更多次命中，他造成的伤害也会显著提高。

description.desc: Each subsequent hit Binwin does during the same attack deals $amount% more damage, stacking multiplicatively.$binwin_show_hits
宾温同一次攻击中的每一次后续命中会多造成 $amount% 伤害，以乘算方式堆叠。$binwin_show_hits

While Binwin is your BUD-setting Champion and he attacks but does not kill an enemy, the enemy takes $amount% of the damage it took over the next 5 seconds. $(if upgrade_purchased 18461) $bud_setting_active $(fi)
当宾温是你的基础杀招伤害设置勇士，并且他的攻击未能将一名敌人击杀时，该敌人在接下来的 5 秒内会受到相当于其所受伤害 $amount% 的伤害。$(if upgrade_purchased 18461) $bud_setting_active $(fi)

When Binwin defeats an enemy, he gains stacks of Overkill based on how many orders of magnitude more damage he did compared to the enemy's remaining health. Binwin's damage is increased by $amount% for each Overkill stack, stacking additively. Overkill stacks persist until the adventure resets.
当宾温击败一名敌人时，他会根据他造成的伤害比敌人剩余的生命值高出的数量级数量获得“过度杀戮”堆叠层数。每有一层“过度杀戮”，宾温的伤害提高 $amount%，以加算方式堆叠。“过度杀戮”堆叠层数会一直保留到冒险重置。

specializationDescription.original: Binwin keeps track of how hard he hits, and hits even harder the harder he hits.
specializationDescription.display: 宾温会记录他打击的力度，并且会越打越狠。

description.desc: Binwin encourages the Champions adjacent to him to attack more frequently, reducing their base attack cooldowns by 2 seconds and increasing his own damage by $amount%.
宾温鼓励与他相邻的勇士更频繁地发动攻击，使他们的基本攻击冷却时间减少 2 秒，并使他自身的伤害提高 $amount%。

specializationDescription.original: Binwin rallies those adjacent to him to attack more frequently.
specializationDescription.display: 宾温会激励与他相邻的勇士，使他们更频繁地发动攻击。

description.desc: Binwin's damage is increased by 200% for each dwarf or Small Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively. (Small Champions are fairy, gnome, goblin, halfling, kender, kobold, and plasmoid Champions.)
阵型中每有一位矮人、狗头人、半身人、侏儒、地精或坎德人勇士，宾温的伤害提高 200%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Binwin prefers to hang out with Champions shorter than himself.
specializationDescription.display: 宾温更喜欢与比他矮的勇士待在一起。

description.desc: When Binwin scores a critical hit, he gains an additional Bonus Hit for his current attack. This can occur up to 5 times per attack.
当宾温打出暴击时，他的当前攻击会获得一次额外命中次数。此效果每次攻击最多可触发 5 次。

Binwin deals double hits against enemies or objects with hits-based or armored hits-based health. If Binwin attacks an armored enemy and doesn't break any armor, he gains a Resolve stack. Binwin deals $amount% additional damage for each Resolve stack, stacking multiplicatively up to 10 times, resetting when changing areas.
宾温对拥有基于命中的生命值或基于命中的重甲生命值的敌人或目标造成的命中加倍。如果宾温攻击一名披甲敌人且未能破甲，他获得一层“决心”堆叠层数。宾温每拥有一层“决心”堆叠层数，他会造成 $amount% 的额外伤害，以乘算方式堆叠，最多堆叠 10 次，在变更区域时重置。

tipText.original: Binwin is great at dealing with enemies or objects with hits-based or armor-based health.
tipText.display: 宾温擅长对付拥有基于命中的生命值或基于命中的重甲生命值的敌人或目标。

description.original: Nothin' like an ale and some smashed heads.
description.display: 没什么能比一杯麦芽酒和被打碎的脑袋更让人开心。

description.original: You don't want to get too close to an angry dwarf.
description.display: 你绝对不会想靠近一个愤怒中的矮人。

description.original: My plan of attack begins and ends with 'attack.'
description.display: 我的进攻计划始于“进攻”，也终于“进攻”。

description.original: I have fought five hundred battles, and I will fight five hundred more.
description.display: 我已经打了五百场仗，我还会再打五百场。

description.original: Double axe, to the back.
description.display: 双斧合璧。

description.original: Hey! You forgot something! MY AXE!
description.display: 喂！你有东西落下了！我的斧头！

effects.description: Adds 1 base stack and increases max stacks by 1 for Extra Attacks.

description.original: All I do is chop, chop, chop, no matter what!
description.display: 不管发生什么，我只会做一件事——砍！砍！砍！

description.original: You gotta bin it to win it!
description.display: 你得拼了，不要问太多！

description.original: Come on, shorties! Let's go!
description.display: 来吧，矮子们！我们走！

description.original: We've got to stay on brand, fellow dwarves!
description.display: 我们得注意形象，矮人伙计们！

description.original: So let me get this straight... You just STAND on each other?
description.display: 我很想知道......你们是互相叠站在对方身上的吗？

description.original: Looks like we'll be working together. Lucky you!
description.display: 看来我们要合作了。你可真幸运啊！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Binwin's specialization abilities by $(amount)%

description.original: I'm not here to Bin-Lose.
description.display: 我不是为失败而来的。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Binwin's specialization abilities by $(amount)%

description.original: Talk to the other guy. I don't deal with that.
description.display: 去找其他人，我不管这事。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Binwin's specialization abilities by $(amount)%

description.original: The best thing about minions is if one dies, there's always more.
description.display: 随从最棒的一点是，死了一个，马上又会有新的补上。

effects.description: Extra Attacks will now also be triggered by Champions two formation slots from Binwin.

description.original: I don't need friends! I don't need anyone! I'll do my own thing!
description.display: 我不需要朋友！我不需要任何人！我自己的事情自己做！

effects.description: Extra Attacks will now be triggered only by non-adjacent Champions.

description.original: Let's take our time. Really savor it, you know?
description.display: 我们慢慢来。好好享受，懂吗？

description.original: I actually have a weekly stream.
description.display: 我其实每周都有直播。

description.original: You know I'm actually quite tall, for a dwarf.
description.display: 你知道吗，作为矮人来说，我其实挺高的。

effects.notes: this was a old feat that was a duplicate and never released. can be reused for something else

description.original: Are they sharp? They'll do.
description.display: 锋利不？将就用吧。

description.original: Don't worry, I've got an intricate two part plan.
description.display: 放心吧，我已经想好了一个复杂的双方案计划。

description.original: Plan A: We fight our way out of here. Plan B? We'll deal with that later.
description.display: 方案一：我们杀出一条血路。至于方案二嘛，到时再说吧。

description.original: Double axe to the back!
description.display: 双斧合璧！

description.original: It's... been around.
description.display: 已经穿了......很长一段时间了。

description.original: Hey, my mom made it for me!
description.display: 喂，那是妈妈亲手给我缝制的。

description.original: I've seen a few cloaks in my day. But this one makes me look good!
description.display: 我见过的斗篷也不算少了。但没有一件比它更能衬托出我的好看！

description.original: If I find an acid pit, I can just lay this on top and I'm good, right?
description.display: 要是碰到酸水坑，那就把它铺上去就能安全通过了，对吗？

description.original: It looks like the horn was chewed on by something.
description.display: 头盔上的角似乎被什么东西咬过一样。

description.original: If the horns fall off, you've got yourself an improvised weapon!
description.display: 要是盔上双角被砍下来，那也可以当作武器来使用！

description.original: Best way through a door is headfirst.
description.display: 撞门的要诀就是用头撞。

description.original: Bin it to win it!
description.display: 拼了，不要问太多！

description.original: Given to me by my mother. She collects this kinda stuff.
description.display: 这是妈妈传给我的。她很喜欢收藏这类物品。

description.original: It started talking... and it won't shut up!
description.display: 它开始说话了......而且完全停不下来的节奏！

description.original: Rewards its bearer with riches, but at what cost?
description.display: 能够给佩戴者带来财富，但是代价会是什么呢？

description.original: I am Lady Phylia Stoutheart, Dwarven Quest Stone of Friendship and Loyalty.
description.display: 我是女神菲利亚·决心，矮人友谊与忠诚之任务石。

description.original: It wobbles, but it still rolls!
description.display: 虽然已经摇摇欲坠，但还是可以翻滚起来的！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Binwin's Specializations by $(amount)%.

description.original: Follow my lead!
description.display: 听我号令！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Binwin's Specializations by $(amount)%.

description.original: Pungent and potent.
description.display: 臭气熏天。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Binwin's Specializations by $(amount)%.

description.original: Catchphrase!
description.display: 朗朗上口！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Binwin's Specializations by $(amount)%.

description.original: I'm not the druid. I don't speak duck.
description.display: 我不是德鲁伊，我不会说鸭语。

description.original: QUONK!
description.display: 嘎嘎！

description.original: You give a duck ONE magic wand and everybody gets judgy.
description.display: 给鸭子一根魔法棒，所有人都会变了个样。

description.original: Wielder of the wand of wonder, protector of the minions, and my gold.
description.display: 惊异魔杖的主人。同时也是我的金库和小喽啰们的守护者。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Male Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Dwarf Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions with a WIS score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a STR score of 11 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a GOOD alignment

character_sheet_details.backstory: A grumpy and headstrong dwarf with a penchant for springing traps rather than disarming them, if Binwin's not the first into battle then he's disappointed. There's nary a door, tankard, or acid pit that hasn't felt the wrath of Binwin Bronzebottom at one time or another.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Binwin gains extra attacks and damage based on the actions of those around him. He also synergizes with other Champions of the shorter species.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 一个脾气暴躁而顽固的矮人，喜欢制造陷阱而不是解除陷阱。如果宾温没能第一个冲上战场，他会感到失望。没有一扇门、一个啤酒杯或一个酸池坑不曾感受过宾温·铜臀的愤怒。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 宾温会依据周围人的行动获得额外攻击次数和伤害。他也能与其他矮小种族的勇士们协同作战。

original.name: Twin Axes
original.description: Binwin attacks the front-most enemy with his twin axes, Rook and Ruin.

display.name: 双斧
display.description: 宾温用他的双斧“欺诈”与“堕落”攻击最前方的敌人。

original.name: Barrel Roll
original.description: Binwin hops onto a sturdy wooden barrel and rides toward a single enemy, creating a path of destruction in his wake.
original.long_description: Binwin hops onto a sturdy wooden barrel and rides toward a single enemy, dealing damage along the way. When he reaches the targeted enemy, the barrel explodes, dealing ultimate area damage and slowing all affected enemies.

display.name: 木桶翻滚
display.description: 宾温钻进一个坚固的木桶并滚向一名敌人，对路径上的一切造成毁灭伤害。
display.long_description: 宾温钻进一个坚固的木桶并滚向一名敌人，对路径上的一切造成伤害。当他到达目标敌人的位置时，木桶会爆炸，造成范围杀招伤害并减速所有范围内的敌人。

original.name: Extra Attacks
original.tip_text: Binwin deals more hits based on how many times those near him attack before he does. He also deals far more damage if he does more hits in one attack.

display.name: 额外攻击
display.tip_text: 根据宾温周围的勇士在他攻击之前发动攻击的次数，他会造成更多次命中。如果他一次攻击造成更多次命中，他造成的伤害也会显著提高。

original.name: Overkill
original.specialization_description: Binwin keeps track of how hard he hits, and hits even harder the harder he hits.

display.name: 过度杀戮
display.specialization_description: 宾温会记录他打击的力度，并且会越打越狠。

display.name: 腐蚀的斧头

original.name: Looted Axes

display.description: 放心吧，我已经想好了一个复杂的双方案计划。

display.name: 矮人之刃

display.description: 双斧合璧！

display.name: 发臭的皮革斗篷
display.description: 已经穿了......很长一段时间了。

original.name: Patchwork Cloak
original.description: Hey, my mom made it for me!

display.name: 拼缝的斗篷
display.description: 喂，那是妈妈亲手给我缝制的。

original.name: Dashing Cloak
original.description: I've seen a few cloaks in my day. But this one makes me look good!

display.name: 时髦的斗篷
display.description: 我见过的斗篷也不算少了。但没有一件比它更能衬托出我的好看！

original.name: Bronzebottom's Acid-Washed Cloak
original.description: If I find an acid pit, I can just lay this on top and I'm good, right?

display.name: 青铜臀的酸洗斗篷
display.description: 要是碰到酸水坑，那就把它铺上去就能安全通过了，对吗？

original.name: Old Helmet
original.description: It looks like the horn was chewed on by something.

display.name: 旧头盔
display.description: 头盔上的角似乎被什么东西咬过一样。

original.name: Battered Skull Cap
original.description: If the horns fall off, you've got yourself an improvised weapon!

display.name: 磨损的无边盔
display.description: 要是盔上双角被砍下来，那也可以当作武器来使用！

original.name: Helm of Door-bashing
original.description: Best way through a door is headfirst.

display.name: 撞门盔
display.description: 撞门的要诀就是用头撞。

original.name: Helm of the Binwin
original.description: Bin it to win it!

display.name: 宾温的头盔
display.description: 拼了，不要问太多！

original.name: Broken Quest Stone
original.description: Given to me by my mother. She collects this kinda stuff.

display.name: 碎裂的任务石
display.description: 这是妈妈传给我的。她很喜欢收藏这类物品。

original.name: Chatty Quest Stone
original.description: It started talking... and it won't shut up!

display.name: 唠叨的任务石
display.description: 它开始说话了......而且完全停不下来的节奏！

original.name: Dwarven Quest Stone
original.description: Rewards its bearer with riches, but at what cost?

display.name: 矮人任务石
display.description: 能够给佩戴者带来财富，但是代价会是什么呢？

original.name: Lady Phylia
original.description: I am Lady Phylia Stoutheart, Dwarven Quest Stone of Friendship and Loyalty.

display.name: 菲利亚女神
display.description: 我是女神菲利亚·决心，矮人友谊与忠诚之任务石。

original.name: Rusty Barrel
original.description: It wobbles, but it still rolls!

display.description: 虽然已经摇摇欲坠，但还是可以翻滚起来的！

original.description: Pungent and potent.

display.description: 臭气熏天。

effects.description: 使宾温的专精效果提高 $(amount)%。

original.name: Battleready Brew
original.description: Catchphrase!

display.name: 战场特酿
display.description: 朗朗上口！

original.name: Duckling Damsel
original.description: I'm not the druid. I don't speak duck.

display.name: 鸭子小姐姐
display.description: 我不是德鲁伊，我不会说鸭语。

original.name: Faithful Duck Companion
original.description: QUONK!

display.name: 忠诚的鸭子伙伴
display.description: 嘎嘎！

original.name: Duck Guard
original.description: You give a duck ONE magic wand and everybody gets judgy.

display.name: 鸭子守卫
display.description: 给鸭子一根魔法棒，所有人都会变了个样。

original.name: Princess Duckersheim
original.description: Wielder of the wand of wonder, protector of the minions, and my gold.

display.name: 鸭克斯海姆公主
display.description: 惊异魔杖的主人。同时也是我的金库和小喽啰们的守护者。
